## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Governance Checklist (required for `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:` PRs)

- [ ] Linked issue exists and is referenced (e.g. `Fixes #123`)
- [ ] ADR added or updated under `docs/decisions/`
- [ ] `README.md` updated with user/operator impact
- [ ] Tests added/updated where applicable
- [ ] Build/tests run locally and pass

## Test Plan

List the exact commands you ran and key outcomes.

## Risks / Notes

Call out migration, compatibility, or rollout concerns.
